name: Instant Jeevamrit-Mix 500g
desc: Dry pre-fermented ZBNF starter — no cow needed, 2 mins prep, replaces 200 L brew
how: 1 scoop + 1 L water · pour every 15 days · 25 doses per pack

name: Beejamrit Seed-Coat Sachets (10×)
desc: Ready-to-dip Vrikshayurveda seed treatment · protects against fungus + boosts germination
how: 1 sachet in 200 ml water · dip seeds 5 min · dry · sow same day

name: Ghan-Jeevamrit Dry Pellets 1kg
desc: Slow-release ZBNF in solid form — perfect for terrace pots, no fermentation smell
how: 2 tbsp per pot · mix top 2 cm · monthly · ~40 pots

name: Panchagavya Concentrate 500ml
desc: Tamil-tradition foliar biostimulant · boosts flowering + fruiting · 5 panchagavya batches in 1 bottle
how: 30 ml per 1 L water · spray leaves every 15 days · ~16 L spray

name: Amrit-Jal Ready Bottle 1L
desc: Seedling-safe weekly liquid feed (Deepak Suchde formula) · open & pour
how: 100 ml per 1 L water · weekly · refrigerate after opening · ~10 weeks

name: NADEP-style Humus Compost 5kg
desc: Maharashtra-pit method, factory-aged 120 days · best for clay & laterite soils
how: 2 handfuls per pot · mix top 5 cm · top-up every 6 months

name: Matka-Khad Effervescent Tablets (20×)
desc: Drop-in tablets dissolve into traditional pot-manure — zero smell, zero prep
how: 1 tablet per 1 L water · pour around pots every 10 days

name: Kunapajala Amino-Boost 500ml
desc: Vrikshayurveda (10th-c.) fermented amino-acid concentrate for fruiting plants
how: 40 ml per 1 L water · root drench every 15 days at flowering

name: Bokashi Starter Kit (Bran + Bin)
desc: Apartment kitchen-waste composter · zero smell · 2-week cycle · re-fillable bran
how: 1 tbsp bran over wet waste · seal · empty into pot after 2 weeks

name: 🎁 Busy Gardener Starter Combo
desc: Best-seller bundle: Instant Jeevamrit + Amrit-Jal Bottle + Ghan-Jeevamrit Pellets + Seed-Coat Sachets — 3 months of organic feeding in one box
how: Follow the QR-coded weekly schedule inside · serves ~15 pots

name: 🌍 Soil-Fix Combo (Acidic Soil)
desc: For laterite / forest / peaty soils: Dolomite Lime + Wood Ash + Leaf-Mould — restores pH organically
how: Apply per soil-test result · re-test after 30 days

name: 🌍 Soil-Fix Combo (Compacted Clay)
desc: For black-cotton & heavy clay: Natural Gypsum + Biochar + NADEP Humus — breaks compaction in 1 season
how: Mix into top 10 cm of bed · water thoroughly

name: 🌍 Soil-Fix Combo (Sandy/Coastal)
desc: For coastal sandy + arid soils: Coir-Pith Compost + Vermicompost + Seaweed Extract — boosts water-holding
how: Mix 20% into soil · spray seaweed monthly
